name: Ziqian Zhang (张子谦)
department: School of Cyber Science and Technology
university: University of Science and Technology of China (USTC)
about: I am a researcher working on human-centered artificial intelligence, trustworthy machine learning, and computational social science. My work studies how intelligent systems affect expert decisions, user behavior, and organizational practice.

Before joining University Name, I received my Ph.D. from Institution Name and B.Eng. from Institution Name. I am interested in advising students who enjoy careful empirical work, strong engineering, and clear research questions.
